final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical infographic showing an exploded-view breakdown of a Sony A7 camera with all components labeled (all in-image text in Spanish).

Style/medium: needs a technical diagram / exploded-view aesthetic — exact line weight and illustration style is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all camera components separated and clearly labeled
Subject: must include all Sony A7 camera components with their technical names
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, technical documentation atmosphere — exact lighting treatment is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include all component labels in Spanish (sensor, mirrorless mount, EVF, LCD screen, battery, SD card slot, shutter mechanism, IBIS unit, processor board, grip, dials, buttons, ports, etc.)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Spanish by default; must preserve accurate Sony A7 camera anatomy with all major components visible and labeled
Avoid:
